title: Is Planet Labs Building Revenue Stability Through Government Deals
text: Planet Labs has strategically positioned itself to build revenue stability through government and defense contracts. The company's recurring revenue model now represents 97% of total revenue, up from 90% in 2024, demonstrating a fundamental shift toward predictable, long-term contracts. Recent wins include eight-figure ACV deals with European defense customers and a $95 million multi-year contract with the California Air Resource Board for methane detection. The company's backlog has surged to $734.5 million, representing strong future revenue visibility. Defense and Intelligence segment revenues grew over 30% year-over-year, driven by government budgets and geopolitical drivers. The company operates with minimal customer concentration risk as the top customer represents only a small percentage of total revenue. Planet Labs' satellite constellation enables daily global coverage at scale, which governments are willing to commit multi-year budgets to access.
